_comment: POINTS OF INTEREST shown on the war map (icons next to campaign nameplates and zoomed-in planet names). This is a HAND-CURATED list, NOT auto-detected: 'effectType 71' is too broad (it also contains enemy strains, black holes, map markers and holidays), and some POIs (e.g. Molecular Refinement Nexus) aren't type 71 at all. Edit 'poi_effect_ids' (keyed by galacticEffectId) to control exactly which effects are treated as POIs, then reload the page (no re-bake needed). '_names' and '_candidates_not_included' are reference-only and ignored by the renderer.

_names.1236: Center for Civilian Surveillance and Safety
_names.1342: Center for the Confinement of Dissidence
